uplink.description: TER (0x04) datalog frame: 3 measurements (newest last) + trailing battery-percentage byte. Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected temperature/humidity/pressure values produced by running the upstream reference decoder (reference/upstream-codec.js parseTER) as the oracle. Newest measurement at the top level, the two older ones in history (newest-first). Pressure is atmospheric hPa (900-1100). Battery is a percentage -> batteryPercent extra.
uplink._note: Oracle-derived: temperature/humidity/pressure verified against reference/upstream-codec.js. Timestamps normalized to RFC3339 UTC (upstream emits a local-time toLocaleString string); the numeric date fields match the oracle.

uplink.description: TER (0x04) datalog frame with negative temperatures and pressures at the atmospheric bounds (900.00 and 1100.00 hPa). Synthetic in-bounds frame; measurement values produced by the upstream reference decoder as the oracle.
uplink._note: Oracle-derived: measurement values verified against reference/upstream-codec.js. Exercises signed-negative temperature and the air.pressure atmospheric range edges.

uplink.description: Unsupported frame id (0x09 metering, not emitted by this temperature/humidity/pressure device) is rejected. Upstream routes non-environmental ids to its default-null error path; this codec reports the id explicitly.
uplink._note: Error vector: the MCF-LW12TERWP application only emits the 0x04 TER frame; any other frame id is an error.
